## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `cargo test --workspace` from `core/` and all tests pass.
- [ ] I ran `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` and there are no warnings.
- [ ] I ran `flutter analyze` and `flutter test` from `apps/flutter/` (if Flutter shell is affected).
- [ ] I updated `docs/` if architecture, schema, or API contracts changed.
- [ ] I kept changes small and reviewable.
